category_title: Students with high sensory interests and emerging joint attention
scenario_title: Switching off and returning to sensory behaviors at session end
minimal_context: The student and teacher are in the school dinner hall playing with a dog and a ball to sustain interaction.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the dog and the ball. Let's play together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the dog and throws the ball, showing an expression of pleasure.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: The dog brought the ball back. Throw it again.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Takes the ball but just holds it, looking at the dog without throwing it.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to keep playing with the dog.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Suddenly drops the ball, turns completely away from the dog, and begins engaging in repetitive sensory behaviors, switching off from the interaction.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the dog and the ball. Let's play together.

STUDENT: (Looks at the dog and throws the ball, showing an expression of pleasure.)

TUTOR: The dog brought the ball back. Throw it again.

STUDENT: (Takes the ball but just holds it, looking at the dog without throwing it.)

TUTOR: It is time to keep playing with the dog.

STUDENT: (Suddenly drops the ball, turns completely away from the dog, and begins engaging in repetitive sensory behaviors, switching off from the interaction.)

task.content: Sustaining interaction during the 20-minute session with the dog and teacher

context.materials: Dog, rope, balls, brushes, blankets, toys, biscuits, leads and harness
context.social_setting: Session with a teacher and a dog
context.time_context: At the end of the last two sessions

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: At the end of the last two sessions, almost as if he had ‘had enough’
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Suddenly switch off from his interactions with the dog and return to sensory behaviours
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Almost as if he had ‘had enough’

behavior_patterns.condition: When reaching the limit for interaction
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Suddenly switch off from his interactions with the dog and return to sensory behaviours
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Almost as if he had ‘had enough’
